steps.title: Find the y-intercept by setting x = 0
steps.content: The y-intercept is where the graph crosses the y-axis. At this point, $x = 0$. Substitute into the equation: $$y = 8(1.75)^0$$

steps.title: Evaluate using the zero exponent rule
steps.content: Apply the exponent rule that any nonzero number raised to the power 0 equals 1: $$(1.75)^0 = 1$$ Therefore: $$y = 8 \cdot 1 = 8$$ The value of $y$ is 8.
